title: Horus Rising
author: Dan Abnett
synopsis: The first volume of the Horus Heresy. The Warmaster Horus leads the Great Crusade's culminating campaigns even as the seeds of betrayal are sown.

title: Eisenhorn: Xenos
author: Dan Abnett
synopsis: Inquisitor Gregor Eisenhorn pursues a heretic across the sub-sector and finds a conspiracy older than the Imperium itself.

title: Dark Imperium
author: Guy Haley
synopsis: The reborn Roboute Guilliman returns to a galaxy he no longer recognises and leads the Indomitus Crusade against a chaos-claimed Ultramar.
